protein_name: Substrate of the antigen receptor-coupled tyrosine kinase. Plays a role in antigen receptor signaling for both clonal expansion and deletion in lymphoid cells. May also be involved in the regulation of gene expression. Expressed only in tissues and cells of hematopoietic origin. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
